programme.title: Sue Thomas F.B.Eye
programme.desc: The team investigates a bomb explosion at a restaurant; Myles tries a new health regimen.

programme.title: Sue Thomas F.B.Eye
programme.desc: Sue and Jack investigate the kidnapping of a young woman; the team members try to stop their odd quirks.

programme.title: Sue Thomas F.B.Eye
programme.desc: The team searches for drug smugglers after a plane crash; office manager Randy has a new job for Sue.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: Charlie and Rex find themselves at the mercy of a dangerous crime kingpin from their past when they enlist his help on a case.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: When Sarah's former professor is allegedly framed for murder, Sarah calls Charlie and Rex to untangle the perfect crime.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: After a woman is found dead in the snow, Charlie and Rex have a pool of unconnected suspects with only one thing in common -- the victim was convinced they were all her family.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: On the third anniversary of Charlie and Rex's partnership, Charlie recounts how a high-stakes kidnapping brought the duo together on their first case.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: While on the hunt for an escaped murderer, Charlie and Rex are held hostage; when a greater threat emerges, Charlie and his captor are forced to work together if they're going to make it out alive.

programme.title: Haywire
programme.desc: A freelance secret agent working for the government suspects that someone in her organization wants her dead.

programme.title: Anna
programme.desc: Anna Poliatova will unleash indelible strength and skill to become one of the world’s most feared assassins.

programme.title: The Protege
programme.desc: A contract killer ventures out to avenge her mentor’s murder.

programme.title: The Doorman
programme.desc: A former Marine must protect her sister’s family and stop a group of art thieves at a New York City high-rise.

programme.title: Safe
programme.desc: A fighter struggling to deal with a tragic loss rescues a Chinese girl being targeted by the Russian mafia.

programme.title: Blitz
programme.desc: Jason Statham stars as a tough cop who's dispatched to take down a serial killer who has been targeting police officers. Also featuring Paddy Considine and Aidan Gillen.

programme.title: Kill Switch
programme.desc: A psychopathic killer is ravaging Memphis, Tennesse by murdering young women and Detective Jacob Stillwell is on the case. Known as the resident tough cop due to his aggressive tactics, he gets knocked sideways when his girlfriend becomes one of the murder victims. With his partner, Storm Anderson, in tow, Jacob casts the rules aside and infiltrates the seedy criminal underworld of the city looking to avenge his lover's death and put an end to the killings.

programme.title: The Accidental Husband
programme.desc: Emma (Uma Thurman), a radio host, is about to be married to Richard (Colin Firth), her perfect match. But right before her wedding, she learns she's already married to Patrick (Jeffrey Dean Morgan), a charming but irresponsible fireman. Furthermore, Patrick has a secret: he has arranged this little trick because Emma advised Patrick's ex-fiancee to end their relationship. However, Patrick may find that the trick is on him, for he soon begins to fall in love with his uptight adversary.

programme.title: Are You Here
programme.desc: In this touching dramedy, weatherman Steve (Owen Wilson) must join his off-the-grid best friend Ben (Zach Galifianakis) for Ben's estranged father's funeral.

programme.title: Limitless
programme.desc: Facing unemployment and his girlfriend's rejection, writer Eddie Morra is sure that he has no future. That all changes when an old friend gives him a drug that produces enhanced mental acuity. Stoked on the untested chemical, Eddie rises to the top of the financial world and attracts the attention of a tycoon who intends to use him to make a fortune. But terrible side effects and a dwindling supply threaten to collapse Eddie's house of cards.

programme.title: Midnight Sun
programme.desc: A 17-year-old girl suffers from a condition that prevents her from being out in the sunlight.

programme.title: Serving Sara
programme.desc: A process server tries to serve an elusive female target.

programme.title: Sliding Doors
programme.desc: After personal and professional setbacks, a woman experiences an alternate reality.

programme.title: Paper Man
programme.desc: A washed-up writer forms an unlikely friendship with a teenager from Long Island.

programme.title: Tortured
programme.desc: An undercover FBI agent faces a moral dilemma when he's asked to torture a member of one of the world's most powerful crime syndicates.

programme.title: Blue-Eyed Butcher
programme.desc: This true story is a psychological, sexual thriller about a beautiful young woman accused of the brutal murder of her seemingly perfect husband.

programme.title: The Deal
programme.desc: When a grieving woman discovers that the blaze she thought killed her husband and daughter is ruled arson and that her husband is the suspect, her despair fuels a steely determination to untangle the twisted lies about the man she married and the whereabouts of her child.

programme.title: Bad Country
programme.desc: Inspired by a true story, Bad Country concerns a veteran Baton Rouge detective who infiltrates the most powerful criminal enterprise in the South and, after taking down its top lieutenant and contract killer, convinces him to turn informant to help bring down the entire organization including its amoral leader.

programme.title: The Happy Time
programme.desc: An innocent, young boy and his philandering uncle both fall in love with a beautiful maid.

programme.title: Miss Sadie Thompson
programme.desc: A former prostitute inflames the passions of the Marines and a high-minded missionary at a remote South Pacific outpost.

programme.title: The Doctor Takes A Wife
programme.desc: A publicity stunt links a fiercely independent writer in matrimony with a chauvinistic medical school professor.

programme.title: Passport To Suez
programme.desc: This time the Lone Wolf heads for Egypt. William goes undercover to break up a Nazi scheme to steal British plans for the Suez Canal. A good amount of gunplay and chase scenes--including an outstanding chase in airplanes.

programme.title: The Wackiest Ship In The Army
programme.desc: During WW II, Lt. Rip Crandall commands the USS Echo, a run-down ship with the archetypal inexperienced, motley crew, assigned to deliver an Australian observer to a Japanese-held island.

programme.title: Good Fences
programme.desc: An African American attorney moves his family into the posh, white world of Connecticut with provocative results.

programme.title: I'm Charlie Walker
programme.desc: The true story of how one desperate man, armed with only his charm and wits, takes on a racist San Francisco corporation in 1971.

programme.title: The Little Hours
programme.desc: In the Middle Ages, a young servant fleeing from his master takes refuge at a convent full of emotionally unstable nuns. Introduced as a deaf mute man, he must fight to hold his cover as the nuns try to resist temptation.

programme.title: Rock 'N' Roll High School
programme.desc: A group of rock-music-loving students, with the help of the Ramones, take over their school to combat its newly installed oppressive administration.

programme.title: Part 2
programme.desc: Acclaimed director Franco Zeffirelli and an all-star cast come together to deliver a powerful adaptation of the Gospels in 1977's Jesus Of Nazareth. From the Nativity to the Crucifixion and Resurrection, the life of Jesus (played by Robert Powell) is presented with stunning depth, gravity, and emotion.

programme.title: 24 Hours to Live
programme.desc: A former special-ops marine turned mercenary is given one last shot at redemption.

programme.title: Mechanic: Resurrection
programme.desc: Arthur Bishop thought he had put his murderous past behind him when a foe kidnaps the love of his life.

programme.title: The Hunter's Prayer
programme.desc: A deadly assassin (Sam Worthington) is marked for death when he can’t bring himself to kill a young woman.

programme.title: Retribution
programme.desc: A bank executive receives a bomb threat while driving his children that his car will explode if they stop.

programme.title: Mechanic: Resurrection
programme.desc: Arthur Bishop thought he had put his murderous past behind him when a foe kidnaps the love of his life.

programme.title: Karma: Death at Latigo Springs
programme.desc: Charley Stevens moves to the town where her recently deceased mother grew up; after arriving, she is plagued with strange nightmares that tease a horrific event, hinting at why her mother left town.

programme.title: Andromeda: 1883
programme.desc: Space marine Casey Reynolds travels into the past to stop a killer android bent on wiping out the one person crucial to saving the human race.

programme.title: The Wide West
programme.desc: 1907. A mysterious gambler aids a couple of Japanese sumo wrestlers, the local Judge and a beautiful store owner against ruthless outlaws who have attacked a small Californian town.

programme.title: Lone Star Shark
programme.desc: A group of virtual hunters unleash a deadly shark in a Texas lake, causing a young couple to fight for their lives during a peaceful fishing trip in a secluded cove.

programme.title: Taken From Rio Bravo
programme.desc: Two friends pursue a group of human traffickers that have kidnapped five women in 1874, East Texas.

programme.title: Pinkerton
programme.desc: Allan Pinkerton, founder of America's first detective agency, embarks on a mission to capture the notorious outlaw, Jesse James.

programme.title: Shadow
programme.desc: To finally achieve victory over a rival kingdom, a brilliant general devises an intricate plan involving his wife, a look-alike and two kings.

programme.title: The Gangster, the Cop, the Devil
programme.desc: A vengeful crime boss forms an unlikely partnership with a detective, to catch the elusive serial killer who attacked him.

programme.title: Seobok: Project Clone
programme.desc: A former secret agent, Ki-heon, is living in seclusion due to trauma. When he meets a cloned human, Seo Bok, his restless journey begins.

programme.title: Dr. Cheon and Lost Talisman
programme.desc: Despite being the grandson of a famed village shaman, Dr. Cheon doesn't believe in ghosts, yet he makes a living performing fake exorcisms on camera. A mysterious client hires him for a possession case, drawing Dr. Cheon into a series of unexplainable events that challenges his beliefs and revives childhood horrors he's tried to forget.

programme.title: A Sister's Secret
programme.desc: A harmless pastime turns into a nightmare.

programme.title: Bad Nanny
programme.desc: Kendra, consumed with envy, secures a job as a nanny to her sister's daughter.

programme.title: Beyond The Headlines: The Watts Family Tragedy
programme.desc: Includes exclusive never-before-seen footage and new interviews with Tammy Lee.

programme.title: Sisters
programme.desc: A reporter witnesses a brutal murder, and becomes entangled.

programme.title: A Sister's Secret
programme.desc: A harmless pastime turns into a nightmare.

programme.title: Snowman's Pass
programme.desc: Impresario aids fiancée in search for her fallen climber, masking his true goal: finding a spy satellite.

programme.title: New Year's Kiss
programme.desc: After suffering a devastating break-up the same night as Kelly Hartwick, a rock-star creative director, receives an advertising award, she swears off dating in order to focus on a major Christmas ad campaign.

programme.title: The Secrets of Comfort House
programme.desc: A murder investigation in a small town focuses on Wendy Sinclair, who runs a shelter for the victims' wives.

programme.title: Best Friend From Heaven
programme.desc: When her dog is killed, Tara cancels her wedding. But her dog's ghost and her small town have a surprise.

programme.title: Fatal Performance
programme.desc: A struggling actress is hired to impersonate a woman for a business meeting, but soon finds her life in danger.

programme.title: Falcon Rising
programme.desc: Chapman is an ex-marine in Brazil's slums, battling the yakuza outfit who attacked his sister and left her for dead.

programme.title: I'm In Love With A Church Girl
programme.desc: A reformed drug trafficker finds unexpected love with a woman guided by strong faith, testing his resolve to leave his criminal past behind.

programme.title: Take Back
programme.desc: Zara (Gillian White) and Brian (Michael Jai White) are living the perfect small town life when a mysterious stranger from Zara's secret past kidnaps their daughter and now they must race to save her life.

programme.title: The Moon is in Aquarius
programme.desc: On a starry night lit by an Aquarius full moon, Devante and Liz collide at a house party in San Francisco. The spark is instant-and impossible to ignore. Ditching the crowd, they embark on a spontaneous journey through the city's winding streets, iconic views, and hidden gems. With every laugh and shared secret, their bond deepens. But is this love story bound by time-do they only have until dawn?

programme.title: CODE
programme.desc: Dallas artist MALIK SCHAEFER, also known as CODE, is a rising star in the underground rap scene. Although his checkered past has led him down the wrong road at times, with the help of his best friend, STYLES, Malik is back on the fast-track to success. That is, until he reconnects with the dangerous love of his life, SOPHIA ORTEGA, who threatens to destroy it all. Malik must decide to either follow his heart or live by the code that has served him well for many years: family over everything.

programme.title: Deliveries From Eva
programme.desc: Disgraced music star Reese is surprised to learn that he still has a fan in the form of delivery driver, Eva. The two form an unlikely friendship that begins to sour due to Eva's growing obsession and her struggles with PTSD.

programme.title: Grimy Situation
programme.desc: After being arrested at a young age during a drug deal gone wrong and spending part of her youth in prison for the attempted murder of Agent Harris, the now-paroled 30-year-old Camille Sanders has to find a way to make money without turning back to a life of crime and violating her parole. Struggling to survive with no source of income coming in, Camille's forced to live a double life to make ends meet while convincing her Parole Officer she's been

programme.title: Designer
programme.desc: Dre has aspirations of making it big in the cannabis industry, but when his perceived star plant dies, his hopes and dreams start to fade. He finds himself and his 2 buddies embark on a wild adventure with their sights set on the components to make the strain of all strains of cannabis.

programme.title: Dank
programme.desc: Herc is trying to make it in the NBA but his finances are making the journey difficult. So he decides to purchase and sell “REEFER” an alternate CBD strand that is being pushed in the streets by a crooked mayor.

programme.title: The Drive
programme.desc: A doctor is driving home from a conference when he learns his daughter has been kidnapped, and the betrayal comes from those closest to him. With each mile, the certainty that someone within his trusted circle is responsible turns the journey into a spiral of shock and resolve, as the threat to his daughter’s life grows more personal and more urgent.

programme.title: Bad Blood
programme.desc: A couple plans a weekend at a mountain resort and are stalked by the man's evil twin.

programme.title: Megalodon: The Frenzy
programme.desc: A “frenzy” of five Megalodons - spawn of the original - terrorizes the open ocean.

programme.title: Sleeping Beauty
programme.desc: A princess awakes from a 100-year sleep to discover that life as she knew it is gone.

programme.title: Disaster Strike Force
programme.desc: Oahu’s volcanic disaster becomes a global threat.

programme.title: Airliner Sky Battle
programme.desc: Russians hijack a commercial jet to crash it into a nuclear plant. Passengers and crew aboard must stop them.

programme.title: Triassic World
programme.desc: Dinosaurs used to grow human organs for transplants escape. The scientists that created them must fight back.

programme.title: Onyx the Fortuitous and the Talisman of Souls
programme.desc: Amateur occultist Marcus J. Trillbury, aka Onyx the Fortuitous, is struggling at home and work, but his dreams seem to be answered when he lands a coveted invitation to the mansion of his idol Bartok the Great for a ritual to raise the spirit of an ancient demon. As Onyx and a fellow group of devotees join Bartok to prepare for the ceremony, the getaway of his dreams soon takes a nightmarish turn and Onyx must decide what hes willing to truly sacrifice in order to meet his destiny.

programme.title: Hostile
programme.desc: Juliette, a lone survivor of an apocalyptic era, fights to survive against hunger, thirst, a broken leg and strange, disturbing creatures that only come out at nighttime.

programme.title: Galaxy Of Terror (Edited Version)
programme.desc: The minds innermost fears become reality for the crew members of the Quest when they land on the barren planet Morganthus hoping to find the missing crew members of the starship Remus only to discover something deadly waiting for them. Each member of the rescuing team must come face to face with their darkest fears or perish. The cast onboard the Quest includes Edward Albert (The House Where Evil Dwells), Erin Moran (Happy Days), Ray Walston (My Favorite Martian), Robert Englund (A Nightmare On Elm Street series), Zalman King (Blue Sunshine) and Sid Haig (House Of 1,000 Corpses).The film also had its share of new and emerging talent behind the camera, including James Cameron (The Terminator, Aliens, Avatar), who did the production design, and Bill Paxton, who worked as a set decorator before he later collaborating with Cameron in front of the camera as an actor.

programme.title: The Final Wish
programme.desc: From the creator of the Final Destination franchise comes a new tale of death. Following the passing of his father, Aaron Hammond (MICHAEL WELCH) returns to his hometown to help his devastated mother (LIN SHAYE) and to confront his past demons. Sifting through his fathers belongings, Aaron comes upon a mysterious item that is far more than it seems.

programme.title: Hatchet III
programme.desc: In the epic third installment of Adam Greens slasher franchise, Marybeth (Danielle Harris, Halloween) uncovers the true secret to stopping the voodoo curse that has left the ghost of deformed maniac Victor Crowley (Kane Hodder, Friday the 13th) stalking the New Orleans bayou for decades. An entire police department, paramedic response team, and heavily armed S.W.A.T. unit face off with the iconic monster in this action-packed and explosive horror comedy. Hatchet III is full of stunts and jaw dropping gore effects that raise both the bar and the body count of the previous two films put together. Also starring genre favorites Zach Galligan (Gremlins), Caroline Williams (Texas Chainsaw Massacre 2), and Derek Mears (Friday the 13th 2009 and Predators).

programme.title: Ruin Me
programme.desc: Welcome to Slasher Sleepout: The Ultimate Horror Movie Experience combining camping, haunted houses, and an escape room into one extreme 36-hour event. Six strangers are hooded, dropped in the middle of the woods, and must survive a simulated horror movie. Alexandra, the only participant who has never even seen a horror film, reluctantly tags along with her boyfriend. But when the other campers start to die before their eyes, Alex becomes the star of her worst nightmares.

programme.title: Hunter Hunter
programme.desc: A mysterious predator eludes an aging detective and a cunning outdoorsman to corner and terrorize a woman and daughter trapped in a remote forest cabin.

programme.title: The Furies
programme.desc: When Kayla wakes up in a coffin-like box in the middle of the woods, the first thing she sees is a terrifying masked man with an axe running straight for her. As she runs to try to get away, she realizes she is part of an insane and deadly game. There are six other women running scared in the woods, each with a masked assassin assigned to protect them and kill everyone else. Kayla races to save herself and as many women as she can, but when they start to turn on each other, her killer instinct is unleashed as she does whatever it takes to survive.

programme.title: Skull: The Mask
programme.desc: An ancient artifact known as the Mask of Anhangá possesses and forces those who wear it to carry out visceral sacrifices in gruesome fashion in this splatter-filled supernatural slasher.

programme.title: Ranger, The
programme.desc: After fleeing to the woods to lay low from the cops, Chelsea and her pals must play by the deranged park ranger's rules or they'll never make it out.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Granny's Garden" - Grannie has everyone up at the crack of down to plow the front yard for her garden, while Mr. Drysdale, Miss Hathaway, and a stubborn mule try to stop her.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Hair-Raising Holiday" - After Granny cuts off the top of Drysdale and Clyburn's (his doctor) hair for some homegrown remedy, Clyburn tries to keep her from ever doctoring again. Meanwhile, the Clampetts are looking forward to the Possum Day parade, which of course isn't celebrated in Beverly Hills, so Drysdale has to figure out how to have one to keep them happy.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Gets the Misery" - Jed cheers up Granny by pretending to be sick so she can doctor him. Soon Drysdale and his doctor, Clyburn, are subject to her methods as well.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro brings home a friend, Armstrong Dueser McHugh III, who is coddled by a chauffeur who treats him as frail. The Clampetts know better, and show him a good time, friendship and family.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: When Miss Hathaway gets sick and Mr. Drysdale has to speak at a conference, Jed helps out by running the bank and having Elly be his secretary, while Jethro finds a speech that Drysdale accidentally uses instead of his own. All the while a new teller sucks-up to the men and flirts with the women.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Psychiatrist Gets Clampetted" - Jethro finally gets his bill of health from Dr. Twombly so he can graduate the fifth grade, but Twombly really wants to talk to Grannie again. Drysdale brings him to the Clampetts' just as Grannie showed Pearl how to use a love potion, so everyone thinks Twombly's interest in Grannie is love.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Clampetts Get Psychoanalyzed" - Jethro needs a health certificate to graduate from the fifth grade, so he goes to the only doctor the Clampetts know about - Mrs. Drysdale's psychiatrist. He gets nowhere with Jethro, so Pearl comes and she thinks he is testing her virtue when he tries to lay her on his couch.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Clampetts in Court" - When a couple who ran into the Clampett's car discover that they're rich, they fake injuries and sue the Clampetts.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Clampetts Entertain" - Jed arranges a party to get Grannie out of her doldrums and invites the Drysdale. But when Mr. Drysdale's boss comes and wants to meet them for dinner, he wonders if he's going to be sent to an Alaskan bank when his boss finds out he's been lying about Jed and his family being sophisticated.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Duke Becomes a Father" - Mlle. Denise comes back for the birth of her dog's puppies, and to see Jed. They do some "courtin' and sparkin'" Mrs. Drysdale isn't nearly so happy when she finds the puppies share more in common with Duke the bloodhound than Claude the poodle.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Clampetts and the Dodgers" - Jed and Jethro go golfing with Leo Durocher, coach of the Los Angeles Dodgers, who wants to recruit Jethro as a pitcher when he sees how well he can throw.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Pays His Income Tax" - When an IRS agent gets chased away by Granny, Mr. Drysdale tells him the story of how the Clampetts came to be rich and move to Beverly Hills.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Granny's Spring Tonic" - Miss Hathaway's brilliant-but-frumpy bank protegee Gloria is really a sultry gold-digger with eyes for Jed's $34 million, and Jed's just had his annual dose of Granny's spring tonic.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Cuts the Family Tree" - Mrs. Drysdale continues to be forced into doing "practices from the past" by Mrs. Smith-Standish, who discovers that Jed's family is possibly the first to come the country. If so they'd be famous worldwide, but does Jed want that?

programme.title: Adventures With Bill
programme.desc: In this episode, Red showcases Bill's most dangerous and disastrous attempts at various activities. Bill demonstrates his questionable knife-throwing skills, narrowly missing his targets and himself. Later, Red and Bill attempt to pitch a tent, with Harold holding the pegs, a task that goes terribly wrong. The episode also features Bill's archery attempts, which result in a new hole in the road and a fire after a misguided attempt to "hunt" a bird. The show concludes with a look at Bill's unique and dangerous take on snowboarding, which ends with him buried under a sheet of plywood.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: It's the Friday after Thanksgiving, and Chewed Up is all about transforming leftovers into brand-new masterpieces. Carla Hall whips up a decadent Ice Cream Pecan Pie using leftover pie slices, while Michael Symon cooks a savory Stuffing Frittata. The hosts confess their favorite late-night leftover habits, debate mayonnaise brands, and share wild stories about flying with pets.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: In this Fan Fridge episode, Michael Symon battles a stubborn blender to create a Whipped Cottage Cheese Dip with crispy mortadella chips. The crew embraces the pre-holiday scramble, sharing funny stories about morning commutes and paper cuts.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: During "holiday reset week," Clinton Kelly bakes a festive Stromboli Wreath in a bundt pan. The hosts discuss their vastly different childhoods, play "Holiday Do or Don't," and Michael shares a hilariously horrifying mix-up involving the Hotel Chelsea in New York.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Special guest Liz Symon joins the kitchen to bake her foolproof Orange Olive Oil Cake. While she bakes, Liz and Michael laugh off a viral AI rumor that they divorced, reveal their morning Wordle routines, and recall a disastrous early date involving bad crab stuffed shells.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Guest Amy Sedaris joins the crew for a festive break! Michael leans into his Greek heritage to bake savory Spanakopita triangles, while Clinton and Amy get crafty making adorable "Pinecone Gnomes." The group plays "Chew It or Screw It," debates edible glitter, and shares their most hated foods.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: It's "Holiday Reset Week"! Carla Hall brings a comforting yet lighter meal to the table: Roasted Cauliflower Steaks served with a creamy cauliflower puree and buttery breadcrumbs. The hosts debate the best Christmas movies, Clinton pitches "Bean Week," and the studio briefly loses power!

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Clinton Kelly bakes an impressive yet simple "Invisible Apple Cake" loaded with thinly sliced apples, cinnamon, and nutmeg. The crew discusses the dangers of mandolins, Michael gets emotional recalling a surprise restaurant visit, and they debate holiday party etiquette.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Clinton Kelly, Carla Hall, and Michael Symon welcome comedian Jackie Fabulous as a special guest for a festive holiday episode just two weeks before Christmas. Carla makes a festive holiday ham as the crew mixes holiday cheer, storytelling, and Carla's warm comfort food with Jackie's standout comedic energy.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Michael Symon takes center stage with his prized Prime Rib roast, walking through his technique for low-and-slow roasting and his signature horseradish cream sauce with sour cream and fresh grated horseradish. The hosts share holiday meal traditions, discuss fermented foods and gut health, and celebrate the elegance of a classic holiday beef centerpiece.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: In a festive Cookie Swap episode, Clinton Kelly makes Butter Cookies dipped in chocolate, Carla Hall bakes Molasses Lemon Crinkle Cookies, and Michael Symon shares his grandmother's beloved Pinoli Cookies. Between outdoor filming challenges and a lively Chew It or Screw It game, the holiday baking chaos is at its most delicious.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Clinton Kelly makes a beautifully layered Rolled Lasagna packed with ricotta, mozzarella, and a rich meat sauce, turning a holiday classic into an elegant presentation. The hosts explore the emotional side of holiday cooking and the difference between celebration dishes and intimate family comfort food.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Celebrity chef Rocco DiSpirito joins the Chewed Up crew for a very special Christmas Eve episode as Carla Hall prepares elegant Blue Crab Spaghetti. The conversation covers air fryer controversies, Christmas Eve traditions, and the art of making a restaurant-quality seafood pasta at home.

programme.title: Recipe Lab with Chris Ying
programme.desc: "Super Hacky Rigatoni Alla Vodka" - After testing out the TikTok trend of gochujang pasta, Chris decides to try the same super-hacky, super-fast approach to pasta with a more classical dish: pasta alla vodka.

programme.title: Recipe Lab with Chris Ying
programme.desc: "One Pot 'Chicken Korma'" - Twitter is very upset about this Tasty UK recipe for one-pot chicken korma. Chris is 100 percent sure that 1 this is an intentional troll recipe; and 2 hes going to get canceled for testing it.

programme.title: Recipe Club
programme.desc: "Cocktail Weenies in Grape Jelly & BBQ Sauce" - Dave Chang, Chris Ying, and John deBary tackle a recipe straight out of the 1970s: Lit’l Smokies cocktail weenies simmered in barbecue sauce and grape jelly. We made the original PLUS three variations, including an ultra-luxe version, a keto version, and a one-pot version.

programme.title: Recipe Club
programme.desc: "Recipe Club: Wonder Bread: A Trashy Version of Eggplant Parm" - An American icon gets a (vaguely) Italian treatment.

programme.title: Recipe Club
programme.desc: "Easy Boozy Piña Colada Poke Cake" - This one's a boozy doozy! Chris, Dave, and Bryan tackle Easy Boozy Pina Colada Poke Cake and see if they can make it for under twenty dollars, over two hundred dollars, or with only shelf-stable ingredients in a microwave.

programme.title: Recipe Club
programme.desc: "Grandma Wong's Braised Duck" - Rachel Khong joins Dave and Chris to cook an old family-favorite braised duck recipe three different ways. Dave makes a one-pot version, Chris tries to make it for less than $20, and Rachel goes completely opposite to make a luxe version, spending a minimum of $150.

programme.title: The Dave Chang Cooking Show
programme.desc: The Dave Chang Cooking Show - Dinner with Alex Kaplan: Our guest this week is Alex Kaplan, Head of Coffee Product at Cometeer (who once held the distinction of the world's youngest certified Q grader). Dave has prepared a multi-course menu that winds through Alex's past, including a Swedish waffle, arepes, and a coffee-inspired dessert.

programme.title: The Dave Chang Cooking Show
programme.desc: The Dave Chang Cooking Show: Prepping for Andrew Leland: Green Chile Stew - Dave put together this green chile stew to evoke memories from when Andrew lived in New Mexico. Loaded with fire-roasted Hatch chiles, tomatillos and jalapeno peppers, this stew ticked all the boxes...even if it's admittedly something Dave has never eaten before.

programme.title: The Dave Chang Cooking Show
programme.desc: "Sasha Ashall" - Podcast Producer Sasha Ashall, the maestro behind the soothing sounds of the hit podcasts The Dave Chang Show and Recipe Club sits on the other side of the table for a change, as Dave cooks for Sasha.

programme.desc: Emeril and Chef Shermond Esteen prepare dishes inspired by Shermond's brunch menu.

programme.title: Emeril Cooks
programme.desc: Emeril and Justin Kennedy of Parkway Bakery and Tavern prepare a menu with classic New Orleans sandwiches.

programme.title: Emeril Cooks
programme.desc: Emeril shows New Orleans Saints player Juwan Johnson how to prepare a classic Big Easy dinner.

programme.title: A Taste of History
programme.desc: Chef Walter Staib takes a journey Down Under to Sydney, Australia, where he learns of the regenerative techniques Australian Farmers use to create delicious-tasting Beef and support a sustainable future for the planet. Get ready for a sizzling adventure that celebrates the flavors of Australia in true "Barbie" style!

programme.title: A Taste of History
programme.desc: Join Chef Staib on a flavorful journey through Melbourne, Australia, as he dives into the vibrant culinary scene of this multicultural city. From meeting talented local chefs to uncovering the source of Australian lamb in the countryside, experience the diverse flavors and cultural pulse that make Melbourne a true food lover's paradise.

programme.title: A Taste of History
programme.desc: Chef Walter Staib explores Delaware's pivotal role in American history while savoring mouthwatering dishes like Spicy Corn Relish, Stewed Codfish, and Macaroons. Discover how Delaware's small but significant contributions helped shape American culture and politics, from its early Dutch and Swedish settlements to its crucial involvement in the Revolutionary War.

programme.title: A Taste of History
programme.desc: Chef Walter Staib travels into the heart of Oaxaca, Mexico to embark on a captivating journey that uncovers the art of Mezcal making, guided by local experts who reveal the secrets behind this beloved spirit. The mysteries of the ancient city of Monte Albán await discovery, while renowned Mexican Chef, Rodolfo Castellanos showcases the vibrant flavors of the central market's local cuisine.

programme.title: A Taste of History
programme.desc: Join us on a spirited journey as we explore the rich history of Applejack and Apple Brandy, discovering their colonial origins and witnessing the meticulous distillation process at America's oldest distillery. Chef Walter Staib returns to the historic Harriton House to fire up some apple-inspired recipes, including Scallopini of Pork with Stuffing, a sizzling Apple Flambé, and more.

programme.title: Ellie's Real Good Food
programme.desc: Ellie takes Beth -- a mom, a full-time labor and delivery nurse, and a grad student -- under her wing. Ellie helps Beth rein in her takeout habit with three easy make-ahead recipes that stock her fridge with a week of tasty meals. Recipes include Blueberry-Chia Overnight Oats, Turkey-stuffed Pizza Pockets, Cajun Shrimp in Foil, and Red Wine Salad Dressing.

programme.title: Ellie's Real Good Food
programme.desc: The key to having chocolate in your life in a manageable way is to go for quality over quantity. In this episode, we visit the Chocolate Expo and Ellie demonstrates how to incorporate the joys of chocolate into everyday menus, clarifying how to take advantage of its health benefits. Recipes include Fig & Ginger Truffles, Double-Chocolate Waffles a la Mode, Mocha Java Smoothie, and more.

programme.title: Ellie's Real Good Food
programme.desc: Inez's extreme approach to carbs has left her not only feeling tired, but stressed from making separate meals for herself and her family. Ellie helps Inez bring balance to her home, by dispelling misinformation about carbs and sharing healthy recipes she can enjoy with her family. Recipes include Whole Grain Penne with Chicken, Mushrooms & Spinach, Basil Pesto with Spaghetti Squash, and more.

programme.title: Ellie's Real Good Food
programme.desc: We all love cheese--who doesn't? But there can be too much of a good thing. Ellie answers an SOS from a home where cheese has completely taken over the menu. Ellie, a cheese lover herself, shows how to keep from going overboard with cheese and instead utilize its best assets—its great flavor and health benefits. Recipes include Skillet Mac and Cheese, Parmesan-crusted Chicken Breast, and more.

programme.title: Ellie's Real Good Food
programme.desc: Ellie tackles the challenge we all face every day--what's for breakfast, especially in a busy household when everyone is out the door like a pool ball break. She helps out Mary, a mom and an elite athlete and coach, who literally hits the ground running each morning. Recipes include Make-ahead Mini Frittatas with Leeks and Asparagus, Morning Glory Baked Oatmeal, PB and Grapes Wrap, and more.

programme.title: Ellie's Real Good Food
programme.desc: Ellie visits a busy office where stress has led to junk food snacking and fast-food lunching. Armed with photos of sugary office treats submitted by one office employee to solicit her help, Ellie shares tasty alternatives to fight back. Recipes include Herbed Farro Salad with Chicken, Walnuts, Feta and Spinach, Asian Chicken Wrap, and Buffalo Chicken Salad.

programme.title: Ellie's Real Good Food
programme.desc: There's a gluten-free explosion these days, but how much of it is real and how much of it is hype? Ellie demystifies the gluten issue once and for all with the help of her stepbrother and yoga instructor David Wilder, who has celiac disease. In this episode, Ellie also underscores just how many foods are naturally gluten-free, with recipes that will satisfy everyone. Recipes include Multigrain Pancakes, Steak au Poivre Salad, Roasted Salmon & Fennel with Lemon & Thyme, and more.

programme.title: Ellie's Real Good Food
programme.desc: Does sugar have you in its thrall? Ellie helps one family tackle their sugar quandary so they can continue to do the baking they love in a healthier way without sacrificing flavor. Recipes include Crispy French Toast Fingers with Blueberry Maple Sauce, Banana Bread with Chocolate Drizzle, Coconut Date Balls, and Cherry Chocolate Haystacks.

programme.title: Ellie's Real Good Food
programme.desc: It can be a challenge to put dinner together in a working household. And then what happens when you're working opposite shifts? Ellie helps a frazzled couple trying to get healthy weeknight dinners on the table when conflicting schedules and priorities intervene. Recipes include Shrimp with Spinach, Garlic and Smoked Paprika, Peach Chicken with Crispy Bread Crumbs, and Mango-Coconut Sorbet.

programme.title: Ellie's Real Good Food
programme.desc: He's a meat eater. She's a vegetarian. Their kitchen has become a battleground. Can this marriage be saved? It's Ellie to the rescue with flexible recipes that will bring them together. Recipes include Warm Spinach Salad with grilled sirloin, Panzanella with White Beans with chicken sausage, Forbidden Rice Bowl, and Grilled veggies & lamb kabobs served with Tahini Sauce.

programme.title: Red Light Green Light - Super Simple and more

Tobee and Caitie have a blast, and you can join the fun, too! Green light!

programme.title: Twinkle Twinkle Little Star - Super Simple and more

programme.desc: Today, the Bumble Nums are going to make Weepy French Onion Soup. But the four weepy onions they need are VERY tricky to find. Will Humble, Grumble, and Stumble be able to spot all the onions and get back to the kitchen without crying too much? Watch and see!

programme.title: Put On Your Shoes - Super Simple and more

programme.desc: Mr. Monkey, Monkey Mechanic is the go-to monkey mechanic for every animal's vehicular needs!

programme.desc: Join Mr. Monkey, Monkey Mechanic, as he repairs a whole new bunch of vehicles for even more animal friends!

programme.title: Goodbye A, Goodbye Z - Super Simple ABCs and more
programme.desc: We're saying, "Goodbye" to all of our friends in Alphabet Village. As the school day ends, take a walk through town, and bid farewell to all of the letters.

programme.title: I Like To Ride My Bicycle (Mr. Monkey) - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Let's go on a bike ride with Mr. Monkey and friends as we sing along to this Mr. Monkey version of the original Super Simple Song, "I Like To Ride My Bicycle." This is a great song to introduce during transportation themes! I like to ride my bicycle. I ride it every day. I ride it when I go to school. Or when I want to play.

programme.title: What's Your Name? - Kids Song - Finny the Shark and more
programme.desc: Finny the Shark is saying "Hello" and asking the question "What's your name?" This is a fun song to start the day at preschool! Hello, hello. What’s your name? Hello, hello. What’s your name? My name is Finny! My name is Myrtle! Nice to meet you.

programme.title: Wind The Bobbin Up - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: “Wind the bobbin up. Wind the bobbin up. Pull, pull, clap, clap, clap.” Get up and dance with this super fun version of the traditional English nursery rhyme.

programme.title: Hot Cross Buns - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Here’s one of our favorite traditional nursery rhymes about food, made super simple. Come sing along with the Chef from our “Do You Know The Muffin Man?” and “Pat-A-Cake” videos. Yum yum!

programme.title: Flying Dragon Fruit Cake - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Come forth brave warriors and watch the Bumble Nums catch some Flying Dragon Fruits for their fiery Flying Dragon Fruit Cake! But be careful! They breathe fire and are very fast!

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Martine in Paris, France needs a cake-decorating machine. Her father the baker asks her to ice a giant cake for a party at the Eiffel Tower. When the cake is ready the traffic is terrible. Dizzy flies the cake through the sky over the city.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Vietnamese sisters Sen and Kim are fans of pop star Kellie. They ask for wigs like the one their idol wears. When Kellie’s van gets stuck in a rice paddy, Dizzy comes to lead the way to the concert and the sisters are Kellie’s special guests.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett takes brushes to Willem in The Netherlands who is going to paint a mural on a sea wall. When the mural is almost done, a storm approaches. Jett and Donnie borrow the propeller from a windmill to dry the painting before it is ruined.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jerome thinks Jett’s job is easy so he takes his place. He delivers a bathtub to Nayan in Thailand. Boonying the elephant takes a bath but is startled by a spray of water and runs off. Jett arrives to help bring Boonying back.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett carries tires to Alex and his sister Adriana in Monaco. They’ve built a hot dog car for Alex to ride in a soapbox derby. When ducks cause him to run off the course and into town, Paul comes and leads him back with a police escort.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett brings a battery to Noah in Denmark, who’s built a dinosaur out of plastic blocks. When they power it up the dinosaur escapes and runs through the town. Donnie comes and builds another robot to confront the dinosaur and remove his battery.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett brings a microphone to Ruby, a girl in Australia who hosts her own nature program. She interviews animals until a kangaroo snatches her microphone. Bello comes and plays leapfrog with the kangaroo and Ruby gets it all on tape.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett brings a magician’s hat to Moritz in Austria, who is performing an act with his pet rabbit. As a finale, he will make a piano disappear. The naughty rabbit causes the piano to roll out of the theater. Dizzy comes and uses Rescue Ropes to keep the piano from falling into the Danube River and returns it to the theater for the final trick.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett brings a fireman’s hat to Stefan in Germany. His dad is a fireman and is coming to school to tell everyone about his job. But a fire breaks out and the fire truck runs out of water. Donnie uses a fountain as a giant shower head, attaching it to a hose and tapping into underground springs to bring enough water to save the day.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Meena is going to perform a Bollywood dance with her friends. Jett brings the costumes, but there is a mistake and they are all white instead of many colors. The kids dye the outfits but while they are drying the wind blows them away. Jerome arrives to help Jett gather up the costumes and get them back in time for the performance.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett goes to Peru and lands at a small airport where Pilar and her friends greet him. He gives them pins for their Fantastic Flyers Club. They want Jett to take them on an airplane ride but he is not a passenger plane. Jimbo sends Big Wing, who takes them on their very first trip into the sky!

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett goes to Bolivia and brings a miner’s helmet to Angelo. His dog has run away. They go with his grandpa to the mine where they take a wild ride on a mining cart, which breaks while underground. Donnie arrives and drills his way through the stone surface to save them.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett takes a bicycle to Nadia in Bangladesh, who lives on a houseboat with her Mom. Jett teaches her how to ride. When she wants to ride home they run into rain and the road is flooded. Donnie comes and adapts the bike to ride on water. When Nadia arrives home the houseboat is going down the river and the Super Wings must bring it back.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett arrives in rainy London and brings a teddy bear to Cecily. They give the bear an umbrella and take him out to play. The wind lifts the bear away and he flies over the city and falls into a crowd of people with umbrellas. Jerome comes to lead the crowd in a dance number that ends with the bear being revealed and reunited with Cecily.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett takes a guitar to Shanna in Jamaica, who plays in her family reggae band. They are invited to perform on a ship but miss the boat. Mira comes and transforms a barge into a cool floating stage.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett arrive with a “magic lamp” for Asya in Turkey. She wants a genie to grant her wishes but the lamp does not work, so Jett offers to become her genie. Dizzy comes and helps to fly a magic carpet to Cappadocia where Asya brings ice cream to her Dad who is riding in a hot air balloon.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Learn about the numbers 1,2,3,4 & 5 through rhyme, real-life footage, counting, stories, and repetition - accompanied by classical music and real world imagery.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As babies develop, their understanding of the world, and how its pieces "fit" together, continues to progress. DISCOVERING SHAPES playfully introduces five basic forms circle, oval, triangle, square and rectangle as each appears in the context of toys, nature and everyday objects.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Baby's innate curiosity about all they see and hear increases on a daily basis. Before long, they begin to associate words with objects and to imitate and articulate sounds. Why not give their eyes and ears something wonderful to feast upon? Baby Shakespeare presents little ones with 12 common words that can be found within the rich context of classic poems and the beauty of nature.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Ocean Explorers
programme.desc: Cal, Neptune, Opus, Dean, Tinker and others learn about the flora and fauna of the ocean through STEAM-based principles and real-life footage.

programme.title: Cal's Sound Yard
programme.desc: Cal's Sound Yard is a new animated series from Baby Einstein that introduces the letters of the alphabet and the sounds they make. Why all the tracing and repetition? And why are the letters out of order? Don't worry! There's a reason for all that; the content is based on "The Einstein Way" - a curiosity-driven learning philosophy, from industry experts, inspired by Montessori and STEAM.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Meet fascinating creatures from across the globe and learn to run, hop, and crawl like your favorite animal friends. Dance and sing along to discover animal names and the native habitats of the world's most unique creatures. See real-life images of lions and zebras on the African savannah, then learn animal names through repetition and narration, or simply watch your favorite animals play!

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Sharing the joys and traditions of the holiday season with your little one is truly one of the greatest gifts of parenthood, and Baby Santa's Music Box makes this magical time even more special! Celebrate by treating your baby and yourself to a captivating wonderland of bright lights, sparkling ornaments, sleigh bells, toys, winter scenes, jolly Santas and more -- all accompanied by beloved holiday melodies.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As their communication skills continue to develop, little ones begin to recognize common words and may point to objects or pictures when these items are named. Baby Wordsworth playfully taps into your little one's natural curiosity and introduces 30 words from around the home -- both spoken and in sign language. This engaging program presents little ones with familiar objects in the kitchen, playroom, yard and more -- from the living room window to their favorite teddy bear.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: With the Dolittle, and other Baby programs under their belts, the tots who follow Julie Aigner-Clark's Baby Einstein series will sidle up to Baby Newton expecting a similar exploration of building blocks to brilliance, but this time there's a wrinkle or two. Animation makes its first appearance, and parents steeped in keep-it-simple culture may object to the springy "I Know My Shapes" song, a departure from classical-only video predecessors.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As babies grow, their eye-hand coordination begins to improve as their ability to interact with their surroundings blossoms. It is the perfect time for My First Signs, A playful introduction to 20 common words and phrases from baby's world -- including ''mommy'', ''daddy'' and ''I love you'' -- both Spoken and in Sign Language.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Every stage is an exciting adventure with your newborn. As babies grow, they absorb a wide variety of sights and sounds. And with so much to see and hear, infants seem to enjoy, and be most soothed by, gentle sounds such as your voice or pleasant, restful music. Treat your child -- and yourself -- to the delights of Baby Bach Musical Adventure, an award-winning program that exposes babies to the joy and majesty of classical music while presenting them with stimulating, colorful images.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Discover sign language! Enjoy upbeat, classical melodies as you learn how to sign words and activities related to common main street businesses, where your food comes from, activities related to dining out and more. Learn through real-life footage, narration, and repetition.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As little ones grow, their innate sense of wonder grows too, creating an occasion for celebration with each new discovery. Baby Galileo Discovering the Sky introduces them to that remarkable canopy above us: the sun and moon, fluffy clouds, shimmering stars, colorful planets and whirling galaxies.

programme.title: Farmees Movie Compilation
programme.desc: Farmees brings you the best of nursery rhymes and kids songs. Your kids are sure to enjoy!

This comedy cartoon is perfect entertainment for toddlers.Dinobees has some amazing 3d animations. programme.desc: The kids are so excited to learn about dinosaurs. Here is a collection of our best videos.
